name: @kitbase/analytics-mcp
description: MCP server for querying Kitbase analytics data

scripts.mcp:install: claude mcp remove kitbase-analytics && claude mcp add kitbase-analytics -e "KITBASE_API_KEY=sk_kitbase_Ntp2pduXNVGovB4jrxQXtfRfVXVIb50g" -e "KITBASE_API_URL=http://localhost:8100" -- node $(pwd)/dist/index.js
